response.original_title: What Have You Done To Me?
response.overview: A short film based on the internet’s influence on identity and how it can shape our society, ideologies, beliefs, interests, style and perception of the world. Showcased in three narrative stages - Oblivion, Recognition and Discovery which follows a protagonist who faces these challenges of accepting their true identity without the misconstrued influences of the internet and social media. The film touches on the grip the internet has on young people and society, leading to addiction and the nature repressing your identity to fit in. The question is, can she through this and find who she really is?
response.tagline: scrollin’ on and on and on
response.title: What Have You Done To Me?
